title: Agents Are Just Loops
summary: AWS Developers demonstrates building AI agents using the Strands Agents SDK, showing how agents work as loops where models reason, select tools, and execute them iteratively. The video covers single-tool agents, multi-tool agents with model-driven selection, agents with execution hooks for visibility, and multi-agent orchestrators.
